notes: 7G8 item 1. Differentiates from java-chesslegal per catalog: perft node counts vs legality listing. Verification methodology: two independently written engines (C++ 8x8-mailbox reference and an authoring-side Python 0x88 oracle) agree on every pinned count, and every position with a published table matches it exactly (startpos 20/400/8902/197281 + d5 anchor 4865609, Kiwipete 48/2039/97862, rook-endgame 14/191/2812/43238 + d5 anchor 674624, underpromotion-check 44/1486/62379/2103487, symmetrical middlegame 46/2079/89890). The promotion-storm fixture (36/1669/54047/2519192) is pinned from the double-oracle agreement — NOT the CPW pos4 table; the classic '6/264/9467/422333' belongs to a different (in-check) FEN and must not be 'corrected' back in. ~5.1M leaf nodes total, ~0.3s at -O2. Hand teeth: EP rank-pin position (e4d3 illegal, e4e3 legal), stale-vs-fresh double push, castle-through-attacked-f1 (long side stays legal), promotion move-count 9 with all four suffixes, sorted-list first/last pins, apply-refusal leaves state untouched (perft re-checked after refusal).
